title: Shoonya Ticketing Platform
blurb: Re-architected a stock broker's legacy ticketing into an event-driven microservice — halving the user flow and automating KYC, bank verification and payments.
detail: Shoonya's in-app ticketing lets 140K+ active clients raise 15 types of account-data change requests. As technical lead with a 4-developer team, I rebuilt it from a monolith into a standalone, event-driven microservice and streamlined the journey end to end — delivered in 3 months.
highlights: Cut the ticket-creation flow from 4 steps to 2 by consolidating fragmented legacy journeys.
Automated penny-drop bank verification (HyperVerge), e-sign/KYC (Digio) and payments (Razorpay).
Event-driven services on NestJS + RabbitMQ + Redis with a full audit-log layer.

title: XPRIZO Wallet
blurb: A multi-currency digital wallet for cross-border payments — built from scratch as a Flutter app (iOS & Android) with an Angular back-office.
detail: XPRIZO is an all-in-one digital finance platform (wallet, remittance, FX, merchant/agent payments) serving emerging markets. I led the India team alongside the client CTO and built the product from the ground up on the Sapidblue Accelerator services.
highlights: Built the Flutter app for Android & iOS — live on Google Play and the App Store.
Built the Angular 17 back-office for operations and configuration.
Multi-currency wallet with cross-border transfers, FX and merchant/agent flows.

title: Shoonya TV Charts
blurb: A reusable Android module embedding TradingView's Advanced Charts into a trading app, with live candles streamed from market-data APIs.
detail: A drop-in Android library that brings TradingView-grade charting to Shoonya's trading app. I implemented a custom datafeed, a JavaScript⇄Kotlin bridge, and a real-time candle aggregator — packaged for reuse with Hilt and Retrofit.
highlights: Custom TradingView datafeed (resolveSymbol / getBars / subscribeBars) wired to EOD & TP-series APIs.
Real-time CandleAggregator builds live OHLC candles across 9 timeframes.
Served the charting library on-device via an embedded NanoHTTPD server to satisfy same-origin.

title: IKF — AI Stock Picks
blurb: A self-contained Android feature module surfacing AI-driven stock picks, holdings and a full subscription flow — built to drop into the Shoonya app.
detail: IKF ("I Know First") packages an external AI-forecasting service into a polished, monetized in-app experience on a clean MVVM + Hilt architecture.
highlights: AI daily stock & index picks, performance history, indices and an interactive heat-map.
Full subscription lifecycle: in-app WebView checkout, payment-status polling, cancel-at-cycle-end.
Paging 3 + Room caching, API-key-secured networking, token-based auth bridging Shoonya.

title: Sapidblue Accelerator
blurb: A plug-and-play micro-frontend service platform — auth, payments, wallet, comms and config — composable into new products fast.
detail: A library of standalone micro-frontend services on Angular + NestJS that can be used alone or combined to assemble entire products. It powered multiple client builds including XPRIZO, Cryr and PayPR.
highlights: Independent services: auth, communication, user & config management, retail, wallet, payments.
Reused across products shipped in three markets.

title: Cryr — Credit Reporting
blurb: A US credit-reporting product built on the Accelerator — custom credit business logic, Plaid bank-data integration, and a Flutter customer app.
detail: Cryr delivers credit reporting to US consumers. I built the credit-handling business-logic service on top of the Accelerator base services and a Flutter app for customers.
highlights: Plaid integration for secure bank-account & financial-data access.
Kafka + Redis + MySQL microservice backend on NestJS.
Flutter customer app with the Accelerator powering the back-office.
